title: DevOps Engineer
jd:
Key Responsibilities
Design, build, and maintain CI/CD pipelines for automated build, test, and deployment processes

Create, manage, and optimize Docker containers and container images

Work closely with development and QA teams to ensure smooth deployments across environments

Monitor, troubleshoot, and resolve issues in Linux-based systems

Implement best practices for system reliability, scalability, and security

Support application deployments and infrastructure automation

Assist in container orchestration using Kubernetes (if applicable)

Manage cloud infrastructure and services on OCI (preferred)

Key ResponsibilitiesDocker, Linux,CI/CD, KubernetesMust Have SkillsDocker, Linux, CI/CD, KubernetesGood to Have SkillsOCI, Oracle Cloud Infracture

Pay: ₹500,000.00 - ₹600,000.00 per year

Benefits:

Flexible schedule
Paid sick time
Paid time off
Provident Fund

Work Location: In person
